heroSubtitle: NORTHWEST MISSOURI STATE UNIVERSITY · KNWT · HIDDEN VARIABLES · DIGGING DEEPER
contactBlurb: Broadcast production student seeking summer internship in media. Available for freelance video, photography, and broadcast work.
skillRole: Camera Operator · Broadcast Producer · Video Editor · Photographer
skillAffil: Catvision / NWMSU Athletics · KNWT TV · NWMSU
skillTools: Adobe Creative Cloud · DaVinci Resolve · OBS Studio · NewBlue · Blackmagic Design · TriCaster
skillLive: Multi-camera directing · Live shot selection · Headset coordination · Scorebug integration · Lower thirds · Director timing
skillSpec: Sports broadcast · Short-form edit · Motion graphics · Color grading · Tech news packages
bio1: I'm Grant Hughes — a broadcast production student at Northwest Missouri State University balancing technical storytelling, live sports production, and independent content creation. Expected graduation Spring 2027.
bio2: At Catvision — NWMSU Athletics, I operate broadcast cameras for NCAA Division II football, basketball, soccer, volleyball, and baseball. I serve as the High Wide camera for Bearcat Football, delivering the primary field-wide program angle under live director instruction — including off-campus at Children's Mercy Soccer Stadium.
bio3: I produce Hidden Variables segments for KNWT TV — 3-minute technical pieces translating complex gaming systems into accessible visual narratives, managed from concept through final export in Adobe Creative Suite.
bio4: I also develop social media content for Digging Deeper to extend broadcast reach, and independently produce cinematic motorsport edits with precision pacing and advanced color grading. I've taken my camera everywhere — race tracks, coastlines, airport tarmacs, and everywhere in between.
